message:
refactor(obligation): simplify recovery governor timestamp handling

- Pass now_ns directly to update_first_seen() instead of using
  placeholder zero values that get patched up later
- Make find_stale() a pure read-only function (&self) since timestamp
  initialization now happens in update_first_seen()
- Removes the two-phase "insert placeholder, then patch" pattern in
  favor of correct-by-construction timestamps

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
